verses.text: Hihte pen Noah' tapa Shem, Ham, leh Jafeth-te' suanlekhakte ahi hi. Tuiciin tun' khit ciangin amau sung panin tapate hong piang hi
Jafeth' tapate: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, leh Tiras ahi hi
Gomer' tapate: Ashkenaz, Rifath, leh Togarmah ahi hi
Javan' tapate: Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim, leh Dodanim ahi hi
Hihte pen tuipi gei-a teng mite' pulepa ahi uh hi. Amaute' leitangah amau' kam pau ciat zangin, a beh, a minamin a om uh hi
Ham' tapate: Kush, Egypt, Put, leh Kanaan ahi hi
Kush' tapate: Seba, Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah, leh Sabteka ahi hi. Raamah' tapate: Sheba leh Dedan ahi hi
Kush in Nimrod kici tapa khat nei a, amah pen leitungah a vanglian masa mi ahi hi
Amah pen Topa' mai-ah a minthang sabengpa zong ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin, “ Topa in Nimrod bangin a minthang sabengpa hong suaksak ta hen,” kici hi
Ama kumpi gam kipatna Babel, Erek, leh Akkad hi a, tuate khempeuh Shinar gamsungah om hi
Tua gam panin Assiria gam sungah amah pai-in Nineveh, Rehoboth-Ir, Kalah, leh
Nineveh leh Kalah kikala om Resen khuapite a sat hi. Tua Kalah khuapi pen khuapi lian ahi hi
Egypt pen Lud mite, Anam mite, Lehab mite, Naftuh mite
Pathru mite, Kasluh mite (Filistia mite' pian'na), leh Kaftor mite' pian'na pupi ahi hi
Kanaan pen ama sung pan a suak masa Sidon, Heth
leh Jebus mite, Amor mite, Girgash mite
Hiv mite, Arki mite, Sin mite
Arvad mite, Zemari mite, leh Hamath mite' pian'na pupi ahi hi. Tua khit ciangin Kanaan mite kizelthang hi
Kanaan mite' gam pen Sidon panin kipanin Gerar lam manawhin Gaza ciangdong ban a, Sodom lam panin Gomorrah, Admah, leh Lasha gei-a Zeboiim ciangdong ban hi
Hihte pen a innkuan, a kam pau, a leitang, a minamin Ham' suanlekhakte ahi hi
Eber mi khempeuh' pian'na pupi, Jafeth' u, Shem' sung panin zong tate hong piang hi
Shem' tapate: Elam, Asshur, Arpakshad, Lud, leh Aram ahi hi
Aram' tapate: Uz, Hul, Gether, leh Mash ahi hi
Arpakshad in Shelah kici tapa khat nei a, Shelah in Eber kici tapa khat mah nei hi
Eber' sung panin tapa nih suak a, khat' min pen Peleg ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama hunin leitung kikhen hi. A sanggampa' min pen Joktan ahi hi
Joktan pen Almodad, Shelef, Hazarmaveth, Jerah
Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah
Obal, Abimael, Sheba
Ofir, Havilah, leh Jobab' pian'na pa ahi hi. Hihte khempeuh Joktan' tapate ahi hi
Amau' ten'na gam pen Mesha panin kipanin Sefar lamah nisuahna gam mualtung dong ban hi
Hihte pen a innkuan, a kam pau, a leitang, a minamin Shem' suanlekhakte ahi hi
Hihte pen Noah' tapate innkuan, a khangsimna tawh kizui-in amau' minam ahi hi. Tuiciin tun' khit ciangin hihte tung panin leitungah minamte kizelthang hi.
